Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-31 Nova Advantage DPA Now Offers 5/1 ARM Option
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-31 08:28:28-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Current market conditions have resulted in FHA ARM pricing improvements over the last quarter. The investor behind the Nova Advantage DPA has responded by adding an ARM option to their offerings. For certain borrowers, ARM loans provide significant benefits including a lower introductory interest rate, which reduces initial monthly payments and improves affordability. Please read below for additional details. 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Down Payment Assistance

Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Eg41dbIVdE9CiY99irp6WokB6ENijev1_Z3Svq9oHql8Jg?e=IcXBGY> 

Pricing Tools <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/CapitalMarkets/EqsSCt3XFjFCkbjIP3IjZuEB414J9tfVrqbMu052vxNMWQ?e=5btzBt> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Borrower qualifies at the note rate
*	Caps: 1/1/5
*	Margin 2.0%
*	Available with Repayable 3.5% offering only
*	Minimum FICO of 660

PRICING
